name: Tokyo Koki Co. Ltd.
summary: Tokyo Koki Co. Ltd. engages in the manufacturing and selling of testing and measuring machines and systems in Japan. It offers plane bending fatigue testing machines for testing flat specimen made of metals, ceramics, and polymer materials, as well as for the repeated torsion testing of round specimen with jig tool. The company also provides maintenance and inspection services for general purpose testing machines; and sells products for general consumers. In addition, it is involved in the sale of anti-loosening nuts and construction materials; and contract manufacturing of injection mold parts and assemblies. The company was founded in 1923 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
